expectations.text: Contains all 7 template sections: Overview, Running locally, CI, Writing new tests, Coverage, Known Gaps, Appendix
expectations.evidence: Has Overview, Running locally, CI, Writing new tests, Coverage, Known Gaps — but no Appendix section exists in the file.

expectations.text: Has a tier table distinguishing Unit / Integration / E2E with locations
expectations.evidence: Lines 7-11: table with Tier|Framework|Location|Purpose columns listing Unit (test/unit/), Integration (test/integration/), E2E (test/e2e/).

expectations.text: Has a 3rd-party mocks table listing Stripe and Twilio
expectations.evidence: Stripe and Twilio are mentioned on lines 15-18 as a bulleted list, not a table. No dedicated mocks table exists.

expectations.text: Documents CI workflows (test.yml + e2e.yml) with trigger and filter
expectations.evidence: Lines 80-83: table lists test.yml (trigger: push, filter: excludes E2E / test/unit/ + test/integration/) and e2e.yml (trigger: pull_request, filter: test/e2e/).

expectations.text: Includes an orphan-check statement for CI coverage
expectations.evidence: No mention of orphan-check or any statement verifying tests are not orphaned from CI.

expectations.text: Known Gaps section is present and explicitly empty (no placeholder text lies)
expectations.evidence: Line 140-142: '## Known Gaps\n\nNone at this time.' — section present and explicitly empty.

expectations.text: Appendix contains concrete filter expressions for each workflow
expectations.evidence: No Appendix section exists in the file. Filter expressions are mentioned inline in the CI table (line 82) but not in a dedicated Appendix.
